content:
Is your Riso duplicator producing faded prints or clogging mid-job?
That is a sign your ink is running low or the wrong ink is being used.

✅ Designed for Riso SF9350, SF5030, SF5230, SF5330 and SF5350 duplicators
✅ High-yield ink for cost-effective large volume printing
✅ Consistent bold print quality with smooth ink flow
✅ Helps reduce clogging and improves overall machine performance
✅ Keeps your duplicator running smoothly through heavy workloads

Price: KES 3,500
